case_title: QING FEI XIAO GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR RUI XIAO VS NORDSTROM, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QING FEI XIAO GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR RUI XIAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORDSTROM, INC. $875.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $960.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3500; AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO NORDSTROM. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. THE DAMAGE AWARDED ARE SUPPLEMENTAL TO THE COST OF PLAINTIFF'S AMBULANCE TRANSPORTATION, SO THAT DEFENDANT SHALL NOT CREDIT ITS PAYMENT TO THAT EXPENSE AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DECLARATION TO REPRESENT NORDSTROM BY LYDIA MARTINEZ IN COURT HEARING, FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY QING FEI XIAO GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR RUI XIAO AS TO DEFENDANT NORDSTROM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NORDSTROM, INC.
